Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0853 "STREETHASSLE-0853" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Street Hassle.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Memory from $0400 to $0800 was filled with zeroes in the dump file. This removes some corruption at the top of displayed sprites which was present in the original game. The loading screen comes from the original Melbourne House release.
